absorption: Minor ASK absorption is occurring as the current positive delta fails to lift the price, suggesting sellers are absorbing the buying pressure.
dom_observation: Significant stacked ask walls at 60000 (2.2k) and 59900 (1.9k) are acting as heavy resistance, while the bid side is thin.
reasoning: Price has accepted below the value area with strong negative session delta and heavy sell-side liquidity on the DOM, indicating a high probability of bearish trend continuation.
